column1: # AgSteer OTA Partition Table for LilyGO T-ETH-Lite-S3 (16 MB Flash)
#   - NO phy_init partition! On ESP32-S3 the PHY init data is compiled
#     into the second-stage bootloader. A separate phy_init partition
#     causes the bootloader to crash immediately (infinite boot loop).
#   - otadata is initialised by the flash tool on first upload.
#     If the board was previously flashed with a non-OTA partition

column2: you MUST erase the flash first:  pio run -t erase
